==Biography==
Brian is an avid video game player and eSports follower. He began casting in 2011, where he casted on his [http://www.twitch.tv/crusaderkitten/ personal stream] and for [http://www.reddit.com/r/summonerschool /r/SummonerSchool]. Now, he commentates for the [http://www.nationalesl.com/us/ Electronic Sports League America’s] Go4LoL, Open League, Premier League, and Pro Series and the [http://hsstarleague.com/ High School Starleague].
